title: Doğuş Üniversitesi Rektörlüğü'nden Önemli Bilgilendirme
content:
Duyurular

Detay

Tarih: 23 Şubat 2021

Dear Students,

With the decision  the University Academic Board (Senate) on 22.02.2021, in line with the statement by the Council of Higher Education, distance education process will be maintained throughout 2020-2021 Academic Year Spring Term.

For now, applied courses and laboratory lessons will be conducted with the distant learning method, however, in the following days, lesson hours for the related courses may be redetermined depending on the course of the pandemic and you will be further informed accordingly.

We wish all our students a healthy and successful academic period.
